extortion.description: Handala Leaked 3TB Innovalve Sensitive Data On July 17th, Edwards Lifesciences American company bought Innovalve startup from Sheba for 300 million (https://www.ynet.co.il/economy/article/r1jvlozuc) dollars! So let us give you a gift of 300 million dollars! We are now publishing all data about this startup for free! We have been monitoring this deal for a long time,…
